titleStmt.title: SII 28.56: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 56. (A.R. No. 55 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, west wall.

The mey-kkīrtti beginning with tiṅgaḷēr taru of the king forms the introductory portion of the record. It records that the peruṅguri-sabhā of brahmadēyam Tirukkkaṇṇapuram in Marukaḷ-nāḍu in Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇivaḷanāḍu met at the temple of Biramīśvaramuḍaiya-Mahādēvar in their ūr and made as irai-ili (tax-free) a plot of land of one vēli and 5(1/2)-mā in extent, and further freed it from the tiru-vāśalil-pōnda-kuḍimai, veḷḷān-veṭṭi, vēli-kāśu and such, in favour of Tribhuvana-chaṇḍēśvaramuḍaiya-dēvar, the principal servant of Gaṇapatīśvarmuḍaiya-mādēvar in Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭāṅguḍi in their ūr on receiving 115 kāśu (apparently from the temple). The record is unfinished.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru tanṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkalikaṭintu tanciṟiya tātaiyaiyum tiruttamaiyaṉaiyum kuṟikkoḷa taniḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟiyuṇar tanṟiṟupputalvar tammaiyum tunṟeḻil vānavan villavan minavan kaṅkaṉ Ilaṅkayaṟkiṟaivan pulaṅkeḻil pallavan kannakucciyar kāvalaneṉa ponnaṇicuṭar maṇimakuṭañ cūṭṭi paṭarpukaḻ ḻāṅvaṟki nāṭaruḷi yāṅ
ka[va*r] mātātai munvan=ta potalar teriyal vikkirama nāraṇanṟan cakkaramaṭipaṭuttaḷa Āṅkavanavatari ttorupatānāḷāl tirumaṇi mavulivāḻiyā punen=tiya coḻanena punaintu mannu pallūḻiyuḷ tenṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇan ponmuṭi Ānāpparumaṇi pacun=talai porkaḷantarittu ḷaviya kaḻal virakeraḷanai munaivayil piṭittu tannati vāraṇak katakkaḷiṟṟalu taippittaruḷi Antamil perumpukaḻ cun=tarapāṇṭiyan Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟai veṇkariyum ciṅkācanamu veṅkaḷattiḻantu tanmuṭi viḻattalai virittaṭitacaintatoṭa tellaiyil mullaiyūrturatti Ollaiyil ve
ṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻ Irāmakūṭamuvar keṭa llavaṅkuṭalmaṭi kāṭupukkoḷippa vañciyamputumāmalai ntāṅkarum velaikeḻu kān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟuppittaruḷi Ākavamalla ñcittevitanṟāṅ karumpaṭai yālāṅkavar kaṇṭappayanuṅ kaṅkātiranum vaṇṭamarkaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṟaṇṭiṟal vitarvikkiyum vicaiyātittanum karumuraṭcāṅkamayanu mutalinar camarapiruvottuṭai taranimircuṭaṟ ponnoṭayaṅkeri puraviyoṭum piṭittu tannāṭaiyil cayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻan Onnār koḷḷippākkai Oḷḷeripaṭuttu Oru tanittaṇṭāl porukaṭalilaṅkaiyarkomān vikkiramapākuvin parumaṇi makuṭaṅkāṇ tanna na kannakucciyilum Ārkaliyiḻañciritenṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷa nāṭu tanuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅku muṭikavitta viracalāmekan porkaḷattañci tan kāṟkaḷiṟiḻantu kavaiyuṟṟoṭi yai piṭittutā kari ṅka māni taṟkā miṭṭum vāṭṭoḻili veṅkaḷat lan=ta ciṅkaḷattaraiyan po ṇi muṭiyum kanṉaran vaḻivanturai noḷiḻuttarayanākiya cirivallavan mananarācat
ḷitaṭimāḷikaiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapulattirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti kaṇṭan tinakaranāraṇan kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teri yal maticūtananenṟe na palavaraciṉai kka ḷukkiya māḷikai takappittiḷaikka mila ta mun vantakkaḷiṟṟu cakkaravartti m nāraṇa naṟ perum paṭaiñarai Eva koṇṭu taṇpuṉaṟ periyāṟṟiṭakarai pūṇṭurkkaṭakkamānakaravaiyuḷ munṟāmuṟai taraviṭṭa viḷaṅki neṭu mpiyar laikkaiyaṅkarācan cciyar kaḷiṟṟu piṭakki coḻanum ṇṭiyirācanuṅkunicilai muñcanum taṇṭanāyakan rttanañcayanum yanum viramāṇi peru
roṭu Etirca cūḻa karācanum Avanṟuṇaiviyarum vākai viccayanum kanumātāvum Enumivar mutalinar punaikaḻalaraicaroṭu Eṇṇaruṅkaḷituṇṇena piṭittu Eḻarai yilakka ṭu paṭutta namaiyil ra ṭur kkaḻutai Ercela naṭātti vāṭikai vi caittu maṇṇa natiyilla pārparumāḷikai paṭareripā Aṅkamar veṅkai la villar veḷkulaccaḷukkiyar vallavar kocalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cinturarayyaṉar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An=taritu linaaraicariṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟilonṟavaniyuṭ kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷumukantu nānmaṟaiyor mukantu koḷakkuṭuttu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi ninṟu Aśvametañcetu Araicu viṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻan Uyar
tta perumpukaḻ kovirācakecarivaṟmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 2āvatu kṣatrayacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu marukalnāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirukkaṇṇapurattu pāla ṉum kamutuvan Appirameyan tiruvaraṅkatevanum comattampi tiruvaraṅkan veṇṇaikkūttanum veynirāma kamutu van nārāyaṇanum comattampi kaṇṇan paḷḷikoṇṭānum pālāciriya nāyakoḻuntu cikiṭṭanum kamutuvaniravi tevan ceṅkaṇ malar nātanum comattatiyan nārāyaṇan tirukkaṇṇapura tevanum comattiya nārāyaṇan pon piliyum kaucika ninṟān cikiṇṇanum comattiyan koṟṟan cikiṇ
ṇanum comattiyan kūruṇṇan cirāmanum comattiyan cakkarapāṇi cikiṇṇanum kamutuva nārāyaṇanum kārākkiya nārayaṇanakkanum ve maṟaikkāṭanum pālāciriya nira ncirāmanum pālāciriyan kaṇṇapuratta paraṉ kokulanātanum kaucikan Uttavāci cirāmanum peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Eṅkaḷūrp piramiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar koyilile kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟakkūṭiyiruntu Innāṭṭu tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭi kaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiya mādevarkku mulapiruttiyarāya tirupuvanaśaṇṭeśvara tevarkku nāṅkaḷiṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattu kiḻpāṟ
kellai kuppai toṇṇūṟṟuvan nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai vaṭacciṟuvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ātitta nilattukku vaṭapāṟkellai Apāṟnāḷi ttukku teṟkum Ivicainta perunānkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa rūpāy 2 1000 5 100 5 10� vanta n nilam Onṟe kāle Arai māvu mulakocattuṭpaṭṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻivinṟi candrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka tiruvācalil pontakuṭimai veḷḷān veṭṭi velikācu Epperppaṭṭi tuṅ kāṭṭātomāka Iṟaiyili cetukuṭuttu koṇṭa kācu 100 10 5 Ikkācu nūṟṟu Oru patta
ñcaṅkoṇṭu candrātittavan Anubhavikka Iṟaiyiliyākac cetukuṭuttom tirukkaṇṇapurattuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
